title: 80S Party Game Show
description: The 80s Party Game show from the award-winning world touring Dizzy O’Dare (Winner of the International Festival of Fools & Bussan International Comedy Festival) Get ready to unleash your party animal, throw on your 80s fancy dress, and become part of the most outrageous interactive 80s UK TV game show that never happened. With a killer soundtrack of 80s hits, a glittering host who’s equal parts charming and chaotic, and a line-up of hilariously stupid games like 'Poop the potato', this is your chance to dance, laugh, and compete like never before.
content_warnings: This is a highly interactive show, where audience members play party games through out, but you are not forced to be involved in anything you do not want

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
